creator: jdp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Could you please spell out precisely what you want the repository 
managers to do, using full pathnames relative to $CVSROOT?  We don't 
have the same context you have, and I would prefer not to try to 
guess what you want. 

Also, you refer to de-webalizer2, but there is no such port in the 
repository.
